package rulecoverage

func NegativeHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogic() string {
    ruleID := "helper_or_utils_package_contains_domain_logic"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Generic `helper`, `common`, or `utils` packages that host concrete domain decisions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
